overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a covered pedestrian walkway under a concrete overpass alongside a canal, to an open busy street with multi-lane traffic and neon-lit billboards. Wet pavement reflects the golden hour sunlight mixed with artificial neon lighting throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass alongside canal

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass following a pedestrian with bright red hair wearing a yellow top and green pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and yellow top walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway or monorail structure overhead creating partial cover
water canal running parallel to the walkway on the right side
tall digital advertisement screen displaying 'ALL FOODS' with a cartoon mascot
futuristic benches with glowing cyan neon lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass alongside a canal, with wet pavement reflecting the mixed lighting. The camera follows a distinctive red-haired pedestrian past glowing blue benches and approaches a large digital billboard advertising 'All Foods'.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open street exit

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing forward and passing the red-haired pedestrian, now following a bald character with a distinctive spinal tattoo on their back

notable_agents.action: bald pedestrian with detailed spinal tattoo wearing a gray tank top

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying changing advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the end of the covered section, the camera passes the red-haired pedestrian and follows a tattooed character instead. The overpass structure begins to end as the scene brightens significantly, transitioning from artificial shade to direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with multi-lane traffic and corporate signage

events.description: white sports car drives past on the left side of the street
passing large vertical corporate billboard with illuminated logo on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk following a pedestrian in a white jacket carrying shopping bags, with traffic passing by on the left

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving along the multi-lane street
pedestrian in white jacket carrying two large shopping bags

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving traffic separated by a metal guardrail
various futuristic vehicles driving along the street including a white sports car
tall illuminated vertical sign with corporate logo mounted on a building
line of palm trees along the street median

segments.scene_description: Emerging into open sunlight, the scene reveals a busy multi-lane street with futuristic traffic on the left. The camera follows a pedestrian carrying bags past a prominent corporate billboard and palm trees lining the road, with skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with commercial buildings and vending machines

events.description: passing a bright purple vending machine on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through a denser crowd of pedestrians while maintaining a steady pace along the busy sidewalk

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending machine with glowing interface on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the open sidewalk with moderate pedestrian density. The camera passes a distinctive purple vending machine while traffic continues to flow on the left, and the crowd ahead becomes denser as the journey continues toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban underpass into the bright, expansive bustle of a futuristic city street. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass alongside a canal, gliding past glowing blue benches and a digital All Foods billboard while reflecting mixed light on wet pavement. As the camera passes a red-haired pedestrian to follow a tattooed character, the overpass structure recedes and the artificial shade gives way to direct, brilliant sunlight. The scene then opens into a wide multi-lane thoroughfare featuring futuristic traffic, palm trees, and towering skyscrapers in the distance. Finally, the camera continues along the open sidewalk past a purple vending machine, moving through an increasing density of pedestrians toward the city center.
